queries.sql: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY level ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT kubernetes_namespace_name, AVG(floatvalue) AS avg_val FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE floatvalue IS NOT NULL GROUP BY kubernetes_namespace_name HAVING AVG(floatvalue) > 20
SELECT code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE log LIKE '%test%' GROUP BY code ORDER BY code ASC
SELECT SUM(took) AS total_took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level='info'

expected.note: total_took=150.0

queries.sql: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE level NOT IN ('error', 'warn') GROUP BY level ORDER BY level ASC

expected.note: info=6, debug=4

queries.sql: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(took) AS min_took, MAX(took) AS max_took, AVG(took) AS avg_took, SUM(took) AS sum_took, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(took AS FLOAT), 0.50) AS p50, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(took AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95 FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL GROUP BY level ORDER BY level ASC

expected.note: 8 aggregate columns per group: COUNT, MIN, MAX, AVG, SUM, p50, p95

queries.sql: SELECT kubernetes_container_name, code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(took), 1) AS avg_took, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN level = 'error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS error_pct FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY kubernetes_container_name, code ORDER BY kubernetes_container_name ASC, code ASC

expected.note: Multi-column GROUP BY with error percentage calculation; 7 groups

queries.sql: SELECT level, code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY level, code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND COUNT(*) <= 10 ORDER BY level ASC, cnt DESC

expected.note: HAVING with range condition (cnt BETWEEN 2 AND 10); multi-column GROUP BY; expected 4 groups

queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(kubernetes_namespace_name, 'unknown') AS ns, COUNT(DISTINCT level) AS distinct_levels, COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_codes, COUNT(*) AS total_rows, ROUND(AVG(took), 2) AS avg_took FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY ns ORDER BY total_rows DESC

expected.note: COUNT(DISTINCT) with COALESCE in GROUP BY

queries.sql: SELECT method, level, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(took AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL GROUP BY method, level ORDER BY cnt DESC, avg_took DESC LIMIT 6

expected.note: Multi-column GROUP BY + ORDER BY two columns DESC + LIMIT 6

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS row_total, MIN(throughput_rate) AS min_tput, MAX(throughput_rate) AS max_tput, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, SUM(item_count) AS total_items
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND item_count > 0
GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, avg_tput DESC

expected.note: Multi-column GROUP BY with 6 aggregates, HAVING >=2, two-level ORDER BY

queries.sql:
SELECT sorter_model, COUNT(DISTINCT conveyor_lane) AS unique_lanes, COUNT(DISTINCT pallet_id) AS unique_pallets, COUNT(*) AS event_volume, ROUND(STDDEV(load_factor), 3) AS load_stddev, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate * throughput_rate) - AVG(throughput_rate) * AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_variance
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE load_factor > 20.0 AND charge_remaining < 95.0
GROUP BY sorter_model
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT conveyor_lane) >= 2
ORDER BY event_volume DESC

expected.note: COUNT DISTINCT on two columns + STDDEV + VARIANCE with multi-condition WHERE

queries.sql:
SELECT operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_throughput, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp, ROUND(AVG(scan_attempts), 3) AS avg_scans
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE defect_limit <= 2.5 AND runtime_hours BETWEEN 24 AND 720
GROUP BY operation_mode
ORDER BY avg_throughput DESC

expected.note: 5 rounded AVGs with BETWEEN filter, GROUP BY categorical

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, control_center, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(package_size) AS total_pkg_size, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN scan_attempts > 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS rescan_pct
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY facility_zone, control_center, operation_mode
HAVING SUM(package_size) > 500
ORDER BY facility_zone, rescan_pct DESC

expected.note: 3-column GROUP BY with conditional percentage (rescan rate), HAVING on SUM

queries.sql:
SELECT conveyor_lane, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode = 'auto') AS auto_ops, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode = 'manual') AS manual_ops, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode = 'hybrid') AS hybrid_ops, COUNT(*) AS total_ops, ROUND(AVG(load_factor) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining > 50.0), 2) AS avg_high_charge_load
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY conveyor_lane
ORDER BY total_ops DESC

expected.note: FILTER clauses for pivot-style aggregation + filtered AVG

queries.sql:
SELECT build_signature, ROUND(MIN(throughput_rate), 2) AS min_tput, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.25), 2) AS p25, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.50), 2) AS p50, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.75), 2) AS p75, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.95), 2) AS p95, ROUND(MAX(throughput_rate), 2) AS max_tput
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY build_signature
ORDER BY p50 DESC

expected.note: Full percentile distribution (p25/p50/p75/p95) per build_signature

queries.sql:
SELECT control_center, COUNT(*) AS event_cnt, SUM(item_count) AS items_processed, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cell_temp > 30.0 THEN item_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(item_count), 0), 2) AS high_temp_item_pct
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY control_center
HAVING SUM(item_count) > 1000
ORDER BY high_temp_item_pct DESC, avg_tput ASC

expected.note: Conditional SUM ratio (high-temp items %) with two-column ORDER BY

queries.sql:
SELECT sorter_model, conveyor_lane, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 2) AS avg_defect, COUNT(*) AS samples, ROUND(SUM(load_factor * item_count) / NULLIF(SUM(item_count), 0), 2) AS weighted_avg_load
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE defect_limit IS NOT NULL AND item_count > 0
GROUP BY sorter_model, conveyor_lane
HAVING ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 2) >= 1.0
ORDER BY weighted_avg_load DESC
LIMIT 10

expected.note: Weighted average (load_factor weighted by item_count) + HAVING on aggregate

queries.sql:
SELECT operation_mode, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_runtime, ROUND(MAX(package_size) - MIN(package_size), 0) AS pkg_size_range, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE package_size >= 200
GROUP BY operation_mode, facility_zone
HAVING ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) >= 100.0
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, avg_runtime DESC

expected.note: Range calculation (MAX-MIN) with multi-condition HAVING, 2-column GROUP BY

queries.sql:
SELECT conveyor_lane, sorter_model, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS occurences, ROUND(AVG(scan_attempts), 2) AS avg_scans, ROUND(STDDEV(scan_attempts), 3) AS scan_stddev, MAX(runtime_hours) AS max_runtime
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY conveyor_lane, sorter_model, operation_mode
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND ROUND(STDDEV(scan_attempts), 3) > 0.5
ORDER BY conveyor_lane ASC, occurences DESC

expected.note: 3-column GROUP BY with STDDEV in HAVING, combined with aggregate ordering

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode='auto' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS auto_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode='manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS manual_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode='hybrid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hybrid_cnt, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) * 100.0, 2) AS low_charge_pct
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY facility_zone
ORDER BY low_charge_pct DESC

expected.note: Pivot table style: 3 CASE-based counts + low-charge percentage per zone

queries.sql:
SELECT control_center, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(item_count), 1) AS avg_items, ROUND(SUM(item_count * (1.0 - (defect_limit / 100.0))), 1) AS estimated_good_items, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE defect_limit IS NOT NULL AND defect_limit < 100.0
GROUP BY control_center, operation_mode
HAVING ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) > 20.0
ORDER BY estimated_good_items DESC

expected.note: Computed aggregate (estimated good items = items * (1 - defect/100))

queries.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(conveyor_lane, 'UNASSIGNED') AS lane, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS mean_tput, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate * throughput_rate) - AVG(throughput_rate) * AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_variance_computed
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY lane
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY mean_tput DESC

expected.note: COALESCE in GROUP BY + manual variance computation (E[X^2] - E[X]^2)

queries.sql:
SELECT build_signature, COUNT(*) AS fleet_size, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_hours, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cell_temp > 28.0 AND charge_remaining < 40.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS critical_pct
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE runtime_hours > 0
GROUP BY build_signature
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY critical_pct DESC, fleet_size DESC

expected.note: Multi-condition critical-pct (temp > 28 AND charge < 40) with double ORDER BY
